name: AvbSetProperty
title: AvbSetProperty
description: The behavior of the AVB IL can be configured using properties.

Properties can be set for the current bus context (form 1-2) as well as on an object-specific basis for talkers (form 3-4). The default settings for the properties can be obtained from the table below.

parameters.name: StreamReservation
parameters.description: Stream Reservation is not supported. Set this property to 0.

parameters.name: VlanId
parameters.description: The VLAN ID to be used for sending or receiving AVB packets.

parameters.name: RtpPort
parameters.description: Local client port used for RTP via UDP. RTP is always used in conjunction with RTCP. The RTCP UDP port number is one higher than the RTP port number.

parameters.name: RtspAddress
parameters.description: Remote server address used for RT(S)P via TCP. If not set, no connection attempt to an RTSP server is made when AvbListen is called.

parameters.name: FramesPerPacket
parameters.type: Deduced from SR class and frame rate (if possible).
parameters.description: Constant number of frames per AVTPDU.

parameters.name: VlanPriority
parameters.description: The VLAN Priority to be used for sending AVB packets.
